summary: Backend API testing for Personalized Picks Vault feature. All 9 tests passed. Tested: 1) 'Show me personalized picks for [Pet]' returns ui_action with type='open_picks_vault', 2) /api/mira/top-picks/{pet_id} returns picks grouped by pillar, 3) Concierge suggestion cards have price=null in code design (cards appear when no catalogue items exist for a pillar).
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ detect_personalized_picks_intent function correctly matches phrases like 'Show me personalized picks for X'
✓ /api/mira/os/understand-with-products returns ui_action with type='open_picks_vault' when personalized picks intent detected
✓ /api/mira/top-picks/{pet_id} returns picks grouped by 11 pillars (celebrate, dine, care, stay, travel, learn, fit, enjoy, advisory, paperwork, shop)
✓ Concierge suggestion cards correctly set price: null in code (line 314 in top_picks_routes.py)
✓ Frontend UnifiedPicksVault.jsx correctly shows no price for concierge items (shows 'Concierge® will source' instead)
✓ MiraDemoPage.jsx correctly handles ui_action.type='open_picks_vault' by opening the vault component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personalized Picks Vault feature is fully functional. All backend APIs work correctly. Chat command 'Show me personalized picks for [Pet]' triggers the picks vault UI via ui_action response. Top picks are grouped by 11 pillars. Concierge suggestion cards only appear when no catalogue items exist for a pillar, and they correctly have price=null.

backend_apis: POST /api/mira/os/understand-with-products - 'Show me personalized picks for Mojo' returns ui_action.type='open_picks_vault'
GET /api/mira/top-picks/{pet_id} - Returns picks grouped by 11 pillars with smart badges
features_verified: Chat command 'Show me personalized picks for [Pet]' opens picks vault
Picks grouped by pillar (celebrate, dine, care, stay, travel, learn, fit, enjoy, advisory, paperwork, shop)
Concierge suggestion cards have price=null (code verified at top_picks_routes.py:314)
Frontend UnifiedPicksVault has category/pillar picker and selection mode (code verified)
